name: Adam update single dimension (no bias correction)
8 harmonics
expr: A*sin(2*pi*f*t) + A*sin(4*pi*f*t)/2 + A*sin(6*pi*f*t)/3 + A*sin(8*pi*f*t)/4 + A*sin(10*pi*f*t)/5 + A*sin(12*pi*f*t)/6 + A*sin(14*pi*f*t)/7 + A*sin(16*pi*f*t)/8

name: CIE triple Gaussian
expr: a1*exp(-(lambda - mu1)**2/sigma1**2) + a2*exp(-(lambda - mu2)**2/sigma2**2) + a3*exp(-(lambda - mu3)**2/sigma3**2)
